GST: Moving towards adulthood in 9 years; already a major lever of consumption
results.description: GST was rolled out on the midnight of July 30, 2017 and has rapidly picked up since. It was perhaps the country’s most ambitious tax reform where all states came together eliminate their independent taxation powers and submitted to agree to a common framework, which would allow smooth transactions in a single framework.
